raw_text:
Intern Backend Engineer

Join CloudVault Systems as an Intern Backend Engineer and gain hands-on experience building

scalable backend services in a collaborative environment. You'll work alongside our experienced

engineering team to develop microservices, design REST APIs, and contribute to our core

infrastructure. This is an excellent opportunity to apply your computer science fundamentals to

real-world problems and learn industry best practices in cloud architecture and database design.

About the Company

CloudVault Systems is a fast-growing fintech infrastructure startup based in San Francisco,
dedicated to building resilient, cloud-native backend systems for financial institutions and SaaS

platforms. We're passionate about distributed systems, database optimization, and helping teams
scale reliably.

What You'll Own

1. Assist in the design and implementation of RESTful APIs using Python and Flask/FastAPI

frameworks

2. Learn and contribute to our microservices architecture running on Kubernetes and Docker

3. Write clean, well-tested backend code with guidance from senior engineers; participate in

code reviews to improve code quality

4. Help optimize PostgreSQL queries and understand database indexing strategies under

mentor supervision

5. Collaborate with the team to implement message queue solutions using RabbitMQ for

asynchronous task processing

6. Debug and troubleshoot issues in staging and development environments, documenting

findings for future reference

7. Participate in sprint planning meetings and contribute to technical documentation and design

discussions

8. Learn best practices in API design, error handling, and building resilient distributed systems

Preferred

graduated from a Bachelor's degree

Experience with Git and version control
workflows

Git

  AWS (EC2, S3, RDS)

Perks & Benefits

Flexible work schedule and hybrid work arrangement (2 days in office, 3 remote)
Competitive hourly pay with potential for conversion to full-time role
Mentorship from experienced backend engineers with 5+ years of experience
Access to professional development resources (Udemy, Coursera, industry conferences)
Free lunch on office days and fully stocked kitchen
Collaborative learning environment with weekly technical talks and knowledge-sharing
sessions

Next Steps

Please submit your resume, a cover letter describing your interest in backend engineering, and a
link to your GitHub profile (or code samples) to careers@cloudvault.io. Include the subject line
'Application: Intern Backend Engineer - [Your Name]'. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
Selected candidates will participate in a technical phone screen followed by a take-home coding
assignment and a final round with our engineering team.
